title: IP Whitelist Policy and Documentation
description:
Document the IP whitelist policy for customers connecting DataTools Pro to Salesforce.

### Public-Facing Documentation (for customers)
Whitelist the following IPs for Salesforce connectivity:
- AWS West: 13.52.124.40
- AWS East: 3.224.67.34

### Internal Documentation
- AWS West: 13.52.124.40
- AWS East: 3.224.67.34
- Cloudways Prod: 13.52.124.40
- Cloudways Stage: 147.182.234.144 (internal only, not for customer documentation)
acceptance_criteria: Public documentation lists AWS West and AWS East IPs for customer whitelisting
Internal documentation includes all environment IPs including staging
Staging IP is clearly marked as internal-only
implementation_notes: AWS Elastic IPs allocated in us-west-1 and us-east-1 regions. Cloudways production shares the AWS West IP. Staging IP must not appear in customer-facing documentation.
